properties.name: file.storage.access-url
properties.description: Assets URL for file retrival from storage

properties.name: file.storage.base-path
properties.description: Base path for file storage in local development

properties.name: file.storage.base-url
properties.description: Access url for accessing the files stored in storage by the frontend

properties.name: file.storage.max-file-size
properties.description: Limit for file size that can be uploaded to storage

properties.name: file.storage.max-request-size
properties.description: Limit for maximum request size that can be sent to storage

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT Secret key used for signig and verifying JWT tokes

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT Expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: file.storage.type
properties.description: Type of file storage to be used, can be either local or s3

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g. http://localhost:3000)

properties.name: cors.allowed-methods
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP methods for CORS

properties.name: cors.allowed-headers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed request headers for CORS

properties.name: cors.max-age
properties.description: CORS preflight response cache duration in seconds

properties.name: reservation.expiry.check-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between reservation expiry checks (default: 300000 = 5 minutes)

properties.name: file.storage.s3.bucket-name
properties.description: S3 bucket name for file storage (used when file.storage.type=s3)

properties.name: file.storage.s3.region
properties.description: AWS region for the S3 bucket (e.g. ap-south-1)

properties.name: file.storage.s3.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key ID for S3 authentication

properties.name: file.storage.s3.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret access key for S3 authentication

properties.name: file.storage.s3.public-url
properties.description: Public base URL for accessing files stored in S3 (e.g. https://bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com)

properties.name: spring.kafka.bootstrap-servers
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of host:port pairs to use for establishing the initial Kafka connection.

properties.name: spring.kafka.producer.key-serializer
properties.description: Serializer class for keys.

properties.name: spring.kafka.producer.value-serializer
properties.description: Serializer class for values.

properties.name: spring.kafka.producer.acks
properties.description: Number of acknowledgments the producer requires the leader to have received before considering a request complete.

properties.name: spring.kafka.producer.retries
properties.description: Number of times a producer will attempt to retry a failed request.

properties.name: spring.kafka.producer.properties.enable.idempotence
properties.description: When true, the producer ensures exactly one copy of each message is written to the stream.

properties.name: spring.kafka.consumer.key-deserializer
properties.description: Deserializer class for keys.

properties.name: spring.kafka.consumer.value-deserializer
properties.description: Deserializer class for values.

properties.name: spring.kafka.consumer.auto-offset-reset
properties.description: What to do when there is no initial offset in Kafka or if the current offset no longer exists (earliest, latest, none).

properties.name: spring.kafka.consumer.properties.spring.json.trusted.packages
properties.description: Comma-delimited list of package patterns allowed for deserialization via JsonDeserializer. Use * to trust all packages.

properties.name: spring.kafka.consumer.properties.spring.json.use.type.headers
properties.description: When false, JsonDeserializer uses the configured value type instead of type headers from the record.
